title: Cerebras Landed 2026's Biggest IPO. Here's Why Nvidia Isn't Losing Sleep.
subtitle: A $26.6B market debut, a $20B OpenAI deal, and a chip the size of a dinner plate — but can Cerebras actually challenge the GPU king?
summary: Cerebras Systems debuted on Nasdaq with a $26.6B valuation and surged 68% on its first day. The company's wafer-scale chips excel at AI inference but face a narrowing window as Nvidia's Blackwell architecture closes the gap. Here's what the IPO means for investors in both stocks.

image.caption: Cerebras Wafer Scale Engine — the world's largest chip
